content.problemStatement:
Q5) A . What are NumPy and Pandas? Discuss any two important features of NumPy arrays and any
two commonly used operations on Pandas DataFrames?   ---3 Marks.
content.outputFormat: A single line containing a concise description of NumPy and Pandas, including two important features of NumPy arrays and two commonly used operations on Pandas DataFrames.

sampleTestCases.output: NumPy is a library for working with arrays and matrices. Two important features of NumPy arrays are their ability to perform vectorized operations and their support for broadcasting. Pandas is a library for structured data. Two commonly used operations on Pandas DataFrames are filtering and grouping.
sampleTestCases.explanation: The program prints the required description.

solution.approach: Since the problem does not require any computation, the program simply prints a predefined sentence that satisfies the specification. No input is read.

code.Python3:
ans = "NumPy is a library for working with arrays and matrices. Two important features of NumPy arrays are their ability to perform vectorized operations and their support for broadcasting. Pandas is a library for structured data. Two commonly used operations on Pandas DataFrames are filtering and grouping."
print(ans, end='')
code.JavaScript:
const ans = "NumPy is a library for working with arrays and matrices. Two important features of NumPy arrays are their ability to perform vectorized operations and their support for broadcasting. Pandas is a library for structured data. Two commonly used operations on Pandas DataFrames are filtering and grouping.";
process.stdout.write(ans);
